profile.name: Gajanan
profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
profile.bio: I craft robust, high-performance web applications with a focus on modern user experiences and scalable architectures. With expertise in Next.js, TypeScript, and modern ecosystem tools, I deliver production-ready software designed to excel.

projects.title: SentinelIQ Insider Threat Platform
projects.description: An AI-driven behavioral analytics platform detecting privileged access misuse and insider threats. Integrates LSTM-based UEBA, GNN collusion mapping, SHAP-based explainable AI, and Post-Quantum Cryptography simulations.

projects.title: TrustStream Decentralized Layer
projects.description: Architectural scaffold for a decentralized data integrity layer, featuring a Java-based blockchain orchestrator, Python data engine, Solidity smart contracts, and a Next.js monitoring dashboard.

projects.title: Proton Anomaly Dashboard
projects.description: A premium, glassmorphism-styled web dashboard enabling real-time interaction with a privacy-preserving behavioral anomaly detection API, complete with sequential history visualization.

timeline.description: Leading the architecture and implementation of scalable, high-fidelity agentic tools. Spearheaded multiple high-impact projects including SentinelIQ and TrustStream, collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship production-ready systems.
Architected end-to-end web architectures, optimized CI/CD pipelines, and led a team of 4 engineers transitioning monolithic setups into headless microservices using Next.js and Prisma.
